# Northwest Saudi Arabia

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] conducted research at Northwest Saudi Arabia

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] focused on the Qalibah formation in Northwest Saudi Arabia.

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] located the study area in the northwest-saudi-arabia region.

## Key Findings From This Location

- conducted research at Northwest Saudi Arabia ([[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]])

- The area contains overpressured formations where hydrocarbons are trapped by sealing properties. ([[2013-mark|Mark, 2013, p. 16]])

- The region contains the Midyan Peninsula, which features active continental rifting and carbonate platform development. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 12]])
